name: Biotechnology & Genetics
student_summary: Engineer biology — gene editing, vaccines and bio-manufacturing.
overview: Engineer biology — gene editing, vaccines and bio-manufacturing. Biotechnology & Genetics sits in the Life Sciences family of Science & Research. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You enjoy breaking problems into parts and reasoning them through
who_should_avoid: You want a short, easy study path — this one demands years of serious preparation
Intense competition drains you — entry here is a contest
daily_responsibilities: Apply genetic engineering to real problems
Collaborate with your team using bioprocessing
Keep improving at bioinformatics — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Laboratories and research facilities with focused desk analysis
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
A broad Life Sciences foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Fierce competition for the best seats and roles
A long, demanding preparation and learning curve
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Biotechnology & Genetics is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of bioprocessing
projects: Beginner: explore genetic engineering with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using CRISPR workflows
smaller_city_scope: Viable in smaller cities — demand exists well beyond the metros.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Biology & Life Sciences Research: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Pharmaceutical Research: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Data & Artificial Intelligence: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Biotechnology & Genetics pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹5 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹25 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Biology, Chemistry. Typical degrees: B.Tech/B.Sc Biotechnology, + M.Sc/M.Tech. Alternatives exist: integrated bs-ms at iisers.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Biotechnology & Genetics evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Biotechnology & Genetics is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
